description: CompositionChocolate brown round neck t-shirt made of 100% cotton, with short sleeves and chest printFittingRegularWash care Machine wash separately in cold water using a mild detergent Do not bleach or soak Remove promptly and line dry inside out in shade Warm iron only Do not iron directly on print/embroidery Humanity is the only religion that human beings should follow. Be human, be kind and take the world a step further when you profess humanity. Pair this tee with denims and canvas shoes for a cool look.Model statisticsThe model wears size M in t-shirts Height: 6'; Shoulders: 18"
